description:
A staff-only tool that produces the LegitScript "show me everything that happened for user X" timeline in one click. The artifact auditors actually want.

**Scope**
- `src/app/admin/audit/[userId]/page.tsx` — server component, gated by:
  - Staff role (`users.role = 'staff'`).
  - **Step-up MFA** challenge on every render — even an authenticated staff session must re-prove MFA before viewing.
  - Per-view audit row: `admin.audit_timeline.viewed` with target user_id.
- The timeline merges and sorts by `occurred_at`:
  - `audit_log` rows (auth, consent, PHI access, webhook events applied).
  - `consents` rows (with linked document version).
  - `kyc_verifications` row history.
  - `cases` row history with MDI status transitions.
  - `subscriptions` row history.
  - `billing_events` rows.
- Export to CSV + JSON for offline review / regulatory submission.
- No PHI decryption in this view (only metadata, status, timestamps); a "request full decrypt" workflow goes through a separate approval (deferred to a Phase F+ ticket).

**Acceptance**
- A staff user can reach the timeline for any user via `/admin/audit/<userId>`; non-staff get 403.
- Every view is itself an audit row.
- Export produces a deterministic, sortable CSV ready for legal/regulator hand-off.
title: Admin audit timeline view (per-user evidence query)
